overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban street during golden hour. The scene features covered walkways beneath massive concrete and glass structures, neon signage, digital billboards, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a dystopian sci-fi city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit station entrance with crosswalks

events.description: turning left from open intersection into covered pedestrian walkway
passing by pedestrians and entering the deeper covered area with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered intersection and turning left onto the pedestrian sidewalk alongside the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the road with headlights on
character with red mohawk and white tank top walking past the camera

entered.detail: massive glass and metal roof structure with wooden beams covering the street
green street sign indicating Lakeside Ave mounted on a pole
large purple neon sign displaying WET DREAM text on the building wall
orange and metal railing separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a covered urban intersection during golden hour, with the camera turning left into a pedestrian walkway. The player passes a street sign for Lakeside Ave and walks beneath a massive glass and steel roof structure. A character with a red mohawk walks past, and futuristic vehicles drive along the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines and digital advertisements

events.description: passing cluster of glowing vending machines and digital displays on the left wall
moving deeper into the covered area where artificial neon lighting becomes more prominent

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk passing other pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in light blue outfit walking toward the camera
character in beige outfit walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: bright red and green vending machines lined up against the red building wall
tall illuminated digital display showing advertisements on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered walkway, the environment becomes darker with more reliance on artificial lighting. The player passes bright vending machines and digital advertising kiosks while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The road to the right continues to have moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered transit walkway with digital billboards and distant city views

events.description: passing a large vertical digital billboard displaying FEEL THE CHEMISTRY advertisement
the covered walkway opens slightly revealing massive futuristic skyscrapers in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the long covered walkway alongside the busy road with increasing visibility of the distant cityscape

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking in the same direction ahead of the camera
stream of futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with pink background displaying FEEL THE CHEMISTRY and Naranjita text
massive towering buildings with complex futuristic architecture visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the lengthy covered walkway, passing a prominent pink digital billboard advertising FEEL THE CHEMISTRY. The environment gradually opens up to reveal massive futuristic skyscrapers in the distance, while the walkway remains sheltered by the overhead structure. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction toward the distant city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approach with towering skyscrapers and elevated transit structures

events.description: exiting the deep covered area into a more open urban space with full view of distant skyscrapers
crowd density increases as approaching the busy intersection ahead with more pedestrians visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open plaza area with massive skyscrapers dominating the horizon and more pedestrians in view

notable_agents.action: character in bright green shorts and dark top walking ahead on the left
group of pedestrians walking toward the distant intersection and skyscrapers

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up significantly as the player approaches a vast urban plaza with massive futuristic skyscrapers towering in the distance. The covered roof structure recedes to the right, revealing more of the golden hour sky. The pedestrian density increases as the camera moves toward the busy intersection ahead, with an elevated transit structure visible spanning across the distant road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban intersection into a vast, open futuristic plaza during the golden hour. It begins by turning left into a pedestrian walkway beneath a massive glass and steel roof, passing a Lakeside Ave street sign and a character with a red mohawk as vehicles stream by on the adjacent road. As the camera moves deeper into the walkway, the natural light fades into a darker environment illuminated by glowing vending machines and digital advertising kiosks. The scene then expands past a prominent pink billboard advertising FEEL THE CHEMISTRY, gradually revealing towering skyscrapers in the distance while pedestrians move forward toward the city center. Finally, the overhead structure recedes to the right to open the view to the golden sky, leading the camera into a dense urban plaza beneath an elevated transit structure.
